creator: dhs@frame.work
text:
None of the fprint related packages currently work, they have been marked as deprecated and expired two years ago: https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=f3e655afe7dd7107f7aa2ba97435fe3ab15236fe

I was able to marke it work on FreeBSD and have submitted fixes to upstream.
They have not responded in two weeks so far, so let's fix the FreeBSD packages first.
This is the tracking issue to enumerate all the changes.

Changes:

- Pending for ports
  - [ ] Remove deprecated packages pam_fprint and fprint_demo.
  - [ ] security/libfprint: 0.7.0 -> 1.94.7
  - [ ] security/fprintd: Update to 1.94.3
- Upstream changes for libfprint
  - [ ] https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/libfprint/libfprint/-/merge_requests/499
- Upstream changes for fprintd
  - [ ] https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/libfprint/fprintd/-/merge_requests/210
  - [ ] https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/libfprint/fprintd/-/merge_requests/211
  - [ ] https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/libfprint/fprintd/-/merge_requests/212
  - [ ] https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/libfprint/fprintd/-/merge_requests/213
